AppDescription: MQTT uplink monitor + pluggable payload decoders + sensor visualization + RadioBridge configuration/downlinks + cloud integrations. Import gateway JSON history on uplinks page.
AppVersionNotes: Temperature °C/°F toggle: Sensors charts and Uplinks decoded view + CSV/JSON export. Decoders: custom decoders in test dropdown after save; Node/CommonJS check ignores comments. Python 3.8/3.9 compatible (Optional type hints); Flask import error message.
